---
name: Rules logic
about: Add or revise checklist rule logic
---

## Rule area
What case branch or requirement logic is affected?

## Inputs
What checklist answers should trigger this?

## Outputs
What requirement, risk flag, or print item should appear?

## Source / policy basis
What approved source or editorial policy supports this?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] rule conditions defined
- [ ] output payload defined
- [ ] English copy added
- [ ] Spanish copy added
- [ ] reviewed by content owner
